Our Mission

More Than Learning — A Pathway for Life

Pathways Learning Hub is a nonprofit organization dedicated to guiding youth in Kent, Washington, along the pathways to learning, growth, and success.

Through personalized academic support, sports, and community events, we help students build confidence, strong relationships, and essential life skills — making these opportunities accessible to all youth.

We believe in creating pathways — not just for learning, but for lifelong growth, connection, and opportunity.

Academic Support

Personalized tutoring that meets every student where they are

Mentorship

Building lasting relationships with trusted guides and role models

Enrichment

Sports, arts, and community experiences that fuel growth

Accessibility

Every program open to all youth, regardless of background

Programs

Pathways for Every Stage

From after-school support to career readiness, each of our programs is designed to meet youth where they are and guide them forward.

📚

After School Program

Our flagship after-school program offers academic tutoring, homework help, and enrichment activities in a safe, supportive environment where every student can thrive.

Mon · Wed · Fri
Enroll →
🎓

Pathways to Purpose

College and career readiness workshops that help youth explore their interests, plan for higher education, and develop the skills needed for professional success.

Quarterly
Enroll →
🌿

Beyond the Path

Monthly enrichment sessions that expand horizons through cultural exploration, personal development, and community connection — going beyond traditional academics.

Monthly
Enroll →
📚

Book Club

Students gather to read, discuss, and connect over great books in a welcoming library setting. Building literacy, critical thinking, and community — one book at a time.

Monthly
Enroll →
Summer Camp

A Summer Full of Discovery

Our summer camp gives youth an unforgettable season of learning, exploration, and adventure. From riding in fire trucks to giant outdoor games, kids build memories and friendships that last.

Open to all youth in the Kent area. Enriching activities, field trips, arts, sports, and more — all in a safe, inclusive environment.

Register for Summer Camp
Sports Programs

Building Champions On & Off the Field

Our sports programs develop teamwork, discipline, and confidence — creating well-rounded young athletes and leaders in our community.

🏀

Girls Basketball

Bi-Weekly · All Skill Levels Welcome
Enroll Now

Skill-building, teamwork, and competition for young women who love the game. Open to all skill levels — from first-timers to experienced players. Coaching focused on growth, leadership, and character.

🏀

Boys Basketball

Bi-Weekly · All Skill Levels Welcome
Enroll Now

Develop your game, build camaraderie, and compete with heart. Our coaches focus on skill development, teamwork, and the kind of character that wins both on and off the court.

🎾

Tennis

June · Annual Program
Enroll

Our June tennis program introduces fundamentals and fun on the court. Welcoming beginners and returning players to enjoy the sport in a relaxed, inclusive setting.

⚽

Seattle Somali Soccer Week

August · Annual Celebration
Register

A beloved annual week-long celebration of soccer, culture, and community every August. Bringing together youth and families in a festival of sport and Somali pride.

Leadership

Meet Our Founders

Pathways Learning Hub was built by three passionate women committed to empowering the youth of Kent, Washington.

MA

Miski Abdi

Co-Founder

Dedicated to creating lasting opportunities for youth through education and community-centered programs that uplift every child.

MU

Muna Ahmed

Co-Founder

Passionate about mentorship and ensuring every young person has access to the resources they need to succeed and thrive.

AA

Aisha Abdirizak

Co-Founder

Committed to building inclusive, accessible programs that honor the cultures and strengths of every student in our community.
